rationale: Ukraine continues reclaiming territory and striking Russian logistics — a continuation of last cycle's qualitative shift with no new escalation; Iran deal remains unresolved with no energy price relief for Poland.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukraine's continued advances and logistics strikes are a continuation of last cycle's shift — no new qualitative escalation for Poland's security calculus this cycle.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS jet plans collapse: Europe's defense autonomy at risk
top_events.summary: The Franco-German fighter jet program failure continues to raise questions about EU defense self-reliance, indirectly relevant to Poland as a frontline NATO state dependent on Western security architecture.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran-US deal remains in limbo, meaning no near-term relief on global energy markets or oil prices that affect Polish consumers and industry.
